title: rhododendron glandulosum
intro: Rhododendron glandulosum, also known as the glandular rhododendron or glandular azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Rhododendron glandulosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
